description: Recto: Testimony by Nissim b. Shemarya that Sason b. Natan had deposited with him seventeen counterfeit nizārī dinars. The counterfeiter was the mutawallī al-sikka, or the ṣāḥib dār al-ḍarb. When Nissim tried to exchange the dinars, the deceit was discovered and he was in mortal danger. The judge Yaʾir b. Avraham quelled the matter but the money was lost. Dating: ca. 1090 CE. (Information from Gil and from Goitein's index cards.) Verso contains drafts/formularies of multiple different Judaeo-Arabic legal documents (including one dated Tishrei 1393 Seleucid = 1081 CE concerning a marriage or divorce case between Avraham b. Yeshuʿa ha-Kohen and Rayyisa bt. Yefet) as well as an earlier Arabic state document (see separate record). Also a letter or legal document resembling a letter with the name Shelomo b. Kalev, Yosef ha-Kohen, and terms of address for a dignitary of the yeshiva (Mevasser?).
description_he: צד א': עדות נסים ב' שמריה שססון ב' נתן הפקיד אצלו 17 דינרים ניזאריים מזויפים. כאשר ניסים להחליפם התגלתה המרמה והוא היה בסכנת נפשות. השופט יאיר ב' אברהם השקיט את העניין אך הכסף אבד. מתוארך כ-1090.
